name: axe-devtools-mcp
description: MCP server that runs axe-core accessibility scans (via Playwright) on URLs and HTML, for use with Claude Code and other MCP clients.

scripts.postinstall: node -e "try{require('child_process').execSync('npx playwright install chromium',{stdio:'inherit'})}catch(e){console.error('Playwright browser install skipped; run: npx playwright install chromium')}"
